# Images to hide from the web presentation of The Domestic.
# One entry per line. Blank lines and "#" comments are ignored.
# Match rule: an image is hidden if its markdown src path OR its basename
# matches an entry exactly. So either the full relative path:
#   cha3200_-_rivers_of_london_1.4_artifacts/image_000048_....png
# or just the filename:
#   image_000048_....png
# will work.

# Page-number decoration rendered as a separate image in the source PDF.
